title: feat: add TOTP MFA support
description: This PR implements MFA using TOTP. Added QR code generation and verification middleware.
commit_messages: ui: add qr code display to profile
diff:
diff --git a/src/auth/mfa.py b/src/auth/mfa.py
+def generate_totp_secret():
+    return pyotp.random_base32()
+def verify_totp(secret, code):
+    totp = pyotp.TOTP(secret)
+    return totp.verify(code)
diff --git a/src/auth/middleware.py b/src/auth/middleware.py
+if user.mfa_enabled and not session.get('mfa_verified'):
+    return redirect('/auth/mfa-verify')
